name_en: [With full counter green packaging]!!️ GG Marmont leather double-fold wallet, Gucci continues to update colors with more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont collection with a modern perspective. This double-fold wallet is crafted from forest green leather, with brand identity accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest green leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill compartments.
name_cn:
[With full counter green packaging]!!️ GG Marmont leather double-fold wallet, Gucci continues to update colors with more refined tones. In new colorways and combinations, the brand reinterprets the classic GG Marmont collection with a modern perspective. This double-fold wallet is crafted from forest green leather, with brand identity accessories presented in palladium tone. Forest green leather, palladium tone accessories, double G, eight card slots, two bill compartments.
Model: 428726.
Open dimensions: 21cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Color: Elephant Grey.
